violations.text: Carrots and chicken were received at 109-125F. Food was brought back to be reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
Desserts were not adequately protected from contamination, as no sneeze guard or equivalent protective barrier was provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
Hot-hold unit located in the north concession was not in good repair. Per interview with PIC, unit is in process of being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025
